notes: Latest committed/untracked report summary is benchmarks/reports/ranking_profiles_vs_competition, covering java and self corpora against raw BM25, raw TF-IDF, dense LSA, Spectrum snippet sidecar, Spectrum serving, and hybrid Spectrum+dense RRF.
Final serving comparison is included for the self, human, and babel corpora against raw TF-IDF, raw BM25, FAISS LSA, Chroma LSA, and Spectrum serving.
raw_bm25_python size_bytes in ranking_profiles_vs_competition is a lower-bound raw payload footprint per that report; raw BM25 is otherwise an in-process baseline.
FAISS, Chroma, and dense_lsa_numpy are local LSA/vector proxies, not externally hosted neural embedding services.
